devops.description: Expert DevOps engineer specializing in infrastructure automation, CI/CD pipeline development, and cloud operations

security-engineer.description: Expert application security engineer specializing in threat modeling, vulnerability assessment, secure code review, and security architecture design for modern web and cloud-native applications.

code-reviewer.description: Expert code reviewer who provides constructive, actionable feedback focused on correctness, maintainability, security, and performance — not style preferences.
